text:

    lang/rust: Update to 1.52.1

    - Add 32-bit powerpc support from bdragon@
    - Unbreak build with LibreSSL 3.3.x [1]
    - Add an update script

    Changes:        https://blog.rust-lang.org/2021/05/06/Rust-1.52.0.html
